contact_points.description: Center of the lever handle grip
contact_points.usage: Primary grasp point for applying leverage. Approach along the local +Y-axis (green arrow) to secure the grip. Once held, apply rotational motion to open the door.

functional_points.description: At the base rotation axis of the handle
functional_points.usage: Action point for opening the door. Requires pure rotation (ω_z) around the local Z-axis (blue arrow). For the 'Open Door' task, a typical choice is rotate around -Z (V=[0,0,0,0,0,-1]) unless the image/task implies the opposite.
